Detailed Description

Common includes and definitions.

Definition in file common.hpp.

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum TagValue
 

Identifies the type of a node. CTOR must be last!

The constructors for any type are assigned the sequential tags CTOR, CTOR+1, CTOR+2,... Said another way, this type is abused in that any value >= CTOR can be a valid TagValue.

Definition at line 66 of file common.hpp.

Referenced by sprite::make_ctor_tag(), and sprite::Node::tag().
